'''Bnar's Sacrifice''' was a unique brown [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] that belonged to the legendary [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ood Bnar]]. When Bnar was cut down during the time of the Old Republic, he left his lightsaber crystal as a legacy to those who would come after him.<ref name="SWGTCG" /> Once a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] had tuned this crystal to be used in their lightsaber, it could be used by no other.<ref name="SWG:BS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bnar's Sacrifice appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The crystal was made unavailable following the release of the [[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]], a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]], that totally revamped the Jedi profession.<ref name="PA2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
